metadata.name: Process a Container for De-stuffing at CFS

description: A container with goods for multiple owners (LCL) arrives at the Container Freight Station (CFS) to be unloaded.

nodes.task_description: Receive the container at the CFS and verify its seal is intact.

expected_outcome.value: CFS clerk confirms the container number and that the seal matches the documentation.

nodes.task_description: Break the seal and create a work order for a forklift gang to de-stuff the container.

expected_outcome.value: A work order is created to unload the contents of the container.

nodes.task_description: As cargo is unloaded, check it against the manifest and assign it to a storage location in the warehouse.

expected_outcome.value: Each piece of cargo is tallied, inspected for damage, and stored, with its location logged in the warehouse management system.
